The person hired for the position of Lead Data Analyst will join a strong team focused on driving provider, payer and business partner opportunities for those Solventum measures used for payment, quality, and performance management by government, commercial, and international payer programs. Payment innovation, value-based care, patient safety solutions center our efforts. As a Lead Data Analyst, you will have the opportunity to tap into your curiosity and collaborate with some of the most innovative and diverse people around the world. Here, you will make an impact by: Analyzing requirements, gathering data, producing deliverables, and presenting findings using Solventum HIS methods and products for assigned clients. Interpreting results, creating reports, and visualizing data for internal consultants and external clients. Developing and managing code in SQL, Athena, R, Python, and other languages for data querying and statistical analysis. Work with healthcare experts to develop logic and data-driven solutions that meet Solventum client goals. Your Skills and Expertise To set you up for success in this role from day one, Solventum requires (at a minimum) the following qualifications: Bachelor’s Degree or higher AND Six (6) years of experience in private, public, or government health care sector in an analytics role. OR High School Diploma/GED AND a minimum of (8) years of experience in private, public, or government health care sector in an analytics role. In addition to the above requirements, the following are also required: 6 years of experience working with clinical and claim data. 6 years of experience working on projects including payment modeling, analysis, and creating statistical models. 6 years of experience utilizing programing languages such as Microsoft SQL.
